## 📝 Description

Describe the enhancement to the CI/CD pipeline.

## 🎯 Type of Change

- [ ] New workflow added
- [ ] Existing workflow modified
- [ ] Code quality tool added/updated
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Bug fix in CI/CD
- [ ] Other: ___________

## ✨ Benefits

What problems does this solve or what improvements does it bring?

## 📋 Changes Made

List the specific changes to the CI/CD infrastructure:

- Modified files:
  - `.github/workflows/android-ci.yml`
  - [Other files]

- New files:
  - [New workflow files]
  - [New documentation]

## 🧪 Testing

How has this change been tested?

- [ ] Tested locally with `./gradlew` commands
- [ ] Verified workflow syntax with `act` or GitHub Actions GUI
- [ ] Tested on a branch (not main)
- [ ] All existing workflows still pass

## 📚 Documentation

- [ ] Updated [GITHUB_CI_CD.md](../../GITHUB_CI_CD.md) if needed
- [ ] Updated [CI_CD_GUIDE.md](../../CI_CD_GUIDE.md) if needed
- [ ] Updated README.md if customer-facing
- [ ] Added comments to new workflows

## 🔗 Related Issues

Closes: #[issue number]

## 📋 Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review
- [ ] I have commented my changes appropriately
- [ ] I have updated the CI/CD documentation
- [ ] All workflows run successfully
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing workflows
- [ ] Security implications considered
